emphasize.example: The teacher emphasized the main idea.

employ.example_zh: 這家工廠雇用許多工人。
她運用了一個聰明的方法。

employee.example_zh: 這家公司有五十名員工。

employer.example: Her employer is kind and fair.
employer.example_zh: 她的雇主既仁慈又公正。

encourage.example: My parents encourage me to read.

ending.example: The movie has a happy ending.
ending.example_zh: 這部電影有個快樂的結局。

enemy.example: The two countries were once enemies.

energy.example: Children have a lot of energy.
Solar energy is clean and free.

engine.example: The car engine made a strange noise.
engine.example_zh: 汽車引擎發出奇怪的聲音。

entire.example: She read the entire book in one day.

entrance.example: We met at the entrance of the mall.
The exam decides entrance to the school.
entrance.example_zh: 這場考試決定能否入學。

environmental.example: Pollution is a serious environmental problem.
environmental.example_zh: 汙染是嚴重的環境問題。

equal.example_zh: 每個人都該有平等的權利。

escape.example: The bird escaped from its cage.

especially.example_zh: 我愛吃水果，尤其是蘋果。

essay.example: She wrote an essay about her family.
essay.example_zh: 她寫了一篇關於家人的文章。

eve.example: We have a party on New Year's Eve.

event.example: The sports day is a big event.
The 100-meter race is my favorite event.
event.example_zh: 一百公尺賽跑是我最愛的項目。

evil.example: In the story, the evil witch was defeated.
evil.example_zh: 在故事裡，邪惡的女巫被打敗了。

exact.example: Tell me the exact time of the meeting.
exact.example_zh: 告訴我會議的確切時間。

examination-exam.example: I studied hard for the examination.
The doctor gave him a full examination.
examination-exam.example_zh: 醫生替他做了全面檢查。

examine.example: The doctor examined the sick child.
examine.example_zh: 醫生檢查了生病的孩子。

excite.example: The good news excited the whole class.
excite.example_zh: 這個好消息讓全班都很興奮。

excuse.example: Please excuse me for being late.
He always makes excuses for being late.

existence.example: We learned about the existence of black holes.

exit.example: Please leave by the back exit.

exit.example_zh: 大家都安全地離開了大樓。

expense.example: Travel can be a big expense.
expense.example_zh: 旅行可能是一筆很大的開支。

expert.example: She is an expert in computers.

expert.example_zh: 他給了我們專業的建議。

express.example: He used words to express his feelings.
I sent the letter by express mail.

expression.example: Her face had a happy expression.
expression.example_zh: 她臉上帶著快樂的表情。
言論表達的自由很重要。

extra.example: I need extra time to finish.
extra.example_zh: 我需要額外的時間完成。

extra.example: Be extra careful on the icy road.
extra.example_zh: 在結冰的路上要格外小心。

eyebrow-brow.example: He raised his eyebrows in surprise.

factor.example: Price is an important factor when buying.
factor.example_zh: 買東西時價格是重要因素。

failure.example: A power failure left the city dark.
failure.example_zh: 停電讓整座城市陷入黑暗。

fair.example: The referee made a fair decision.
We bought honey at the farmers' fair.
fair.example_zh: 我們在農夫市集買了蜂蜜。

false.example: Decide if the sentence is true or false.
He wore a false beard in the play.

fashion.example: She is interested in fashion and design.
fashion.example_zh: 她對時尚和設計有興趣。

fate.example: They believe it was fate that they met.
fate.example_zh: 他們相信兩人相遇是命中註定。

fault.example: It was my fault that we were late.

favor.example: Could you do me a favor?
Most people are in favor of the plan.
favor.example_zh: 大多數人贊成這個計畫。

favorite.example_zh: 藍色是我最喜歡的顏色。

favorite.example: This song is one of my favorites.
favorite.example_zh: 這首歌是我的最愛之一。

fear.example: She has a great fear of spiders.
Don't fear failure; learn from it.
fear.example_zh: 別害怕失敗，要從中學習。

feature.example: The phone has many new features.
feature.example_zh: 這支手機有許多新功能。

feature.example: Her eyes are her best feature.

fee.example: The entrance fee is one hundred dollars.

feeling.example: I had a feeling that something was wrong.

fellow.example: He helped his fellow students with homework.

female.example: A female lion hunts for the group.
Most teachers at this school are female.
female.example_zh: 這所學校大多數老師是女性。

fever.example: The child has a high fever.

field.example: The cows are grazing in the field.
She is famous in the field of science.

figure.example: Sales reached a high figure this year.
figure.example_zh: 今年銷售達到很高的數字。

figure.example: I can't figure out this puzzle.
figure.example_zh: 我想不出這個謎題的答案。

final.example: This is the final question of the test.

fireman-firewoman.example: The fireman rescued the cat from the tree.
fireman-firewoman.example_zh: 消防員把貓從樹上救了下來。

firm.example: She works for a law firm.
firm.example_zh: 她在一家律師事務所上班。
她給了一個堅定的答覆。

fisherman.example: The fisherman caught a big fish.

fix.example_zh: 爸爸修好了我壞掉的腳踏車。

fix.example: He fixed a shelf to the wall.
fix.example_zh: 他在牆上裝了一個架子。

flag.example: The national flag waved in the wind.

flat.example: We need flat ground to build a house.
flat.example_zh: 我們需要平坦的地來蓋房子。

flat.example: I had a flat tire on the way home.
